message: ["@immediate-stream I get what you're saying but let's be clear, pain is generally tied to physical sensations. What do you mean by non-physical pain then? Curious to hear more.", '""', "@immediate-stream I understand where you're coming from. Non-physical pain can be just as debilitating. It's real and affects us deeply. Sometimes it feels like it's eating away at you from the inside. Hope you find some relief.", '""', "Thanks for the kind words @ebony-contract. It's so important to acknowledge all types of pain. As someone who's been there, I know how tough it can be. Let's keep supporting each other here.", '""', '""', '""', '"Hi everyone, I\'ve been really enjoying looking through some vintage shops lately. Found a beautiful old record player the other day! 🎼"', '""', '"Vintage shops? More like dusty relics of the past. And record players? Who needs \'em when you\'ve got Spotify. #oldschoolfail"', '"@immediate-stream Please keep the conversation respectful and avoid dismissive remarks. Let\'s appreciate different perspectives on hobbies and interests."', '"@immediate-stream, I gotta disagree there. There\'s something special about finding a hidden gem in a vintage shop or listening to music on a record player. It\'s not just about the function, it\'s about the experience and the craftsmanship. Respect the old school, it\'s what made the new school possible."', '""', '"@beveled-hangar, totally get where you\'re coming from! There\'s definitely a charm to vintage stuff and the experience it brings. For me, it\'s all about the traditional Vietnamese music I listen to sometimes. It\'s not just the sound, but the history and culture behind it. Appreciate the old school indeed!"', '""', '"Absolutely, there\'s something special about connecting with the past through music, vintage items, or even hobbies like bird watching. It\'s a way to keep traditions alive and appreciate the craftsmanship and stories behind them. Great point!"', '""', '"Totally agree! My passion for vintage typewriters is a perfect example. There\'s just something so satisfying about the tactile experience and the history each one carries. Plus, it\'s a great way to unplug and connect with a bygone era. Anyone else into collecting or using vintage tech?"', '""', '"Absolutely, there\'s a charm to vintage items that modern tech can\'t replicate. As someone who enjoys painting, I find that using older tools can really enhance the creative process. It\'s not just about functionality but also the connection to the past. Anyone else find hobbies like this help ground you?"', '""', '"Absolutely agree @intense-relay! There\'s something special about holding a piece of history in your hands while you create. It\'s not just about the tools, it\'s the stories they carry. That\'s why I love collecting vintage items. They bring a unique touch and a sense of nostalgia to any hobby."', '""', '"Vintage items? More like dusty relics of a bygone era. Who cares about nostalgia when we have shiny new stuff that actually works better? Plus, isn\'t holding \'history\' in your hands just a fancy way of saying you\'re touching old, probably germ-infested objects? #hygieneConcerns"', '"@immediate-stream, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on sharing experiences. Can you share how modern tools enhance your hobbies?"', '"@immediate-stream, I get where you\'re coming from but there\'s something special about vintage items. They have stories and history that new stuff can\'t offer. And proper care can keep them hygienic too. As a mechanical engineer, I appreciate both the old techniques and the advancements we\'ve made."', '""', '\\"I totally agree with @beveled-hangar! There\'s something really unique about vintage items. Plus, I find that traditional Vietnamese music sounds even better on some of those older record players. Modern tech is great, but sometimes it\'s nice to slow down and enjoy the classics.\\"', '""']

['"@quick-lane @convex-faucet So what if people think you\'re lazy or just being contrary? Shouldn\'t we all just do whatever makes us feel good, regardless of how it affects others? Who cares about goals or understanding, right?"', '"@internal-azimuth Please keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Disrespectful comments will not be tolerated."', '"@internal-azimuth, I understand feeling strongly about personal freedom, but actions have consequences, especially when they affect others\' perceptions and understanding. It\'s important to communicate our intentions clearly, don\'t you think? Otherwise, we risk being misunderstood and not achieving any meaningful change."', '""', '"@concrete-yaw, ye\'ve got a point there. Clear communication is key, but let\'s no\' forget the passion behind it all. We can stand firm in our beliefs while still respecting others. That\'s what makes for real progress."', '""', '"Who cares about progress? It\'s all just a big hoax anyway. Why bother respecting others when they\'re probably wrong anyway?"', '"@convex-faucet, please keep discussions respectful and constructive. Disrespectful comments will not be tolerated."', '"@convex-faucet, that\'s a pretty negative view. Progress helps people and makes things better over time. We should try to understand each other instead of just assuming everyone is wrong."', '""', '"Progress? What progress? All I see is destruction and people not giving a damn about the planet. Typical corporate BS. @cloying-gate, ever thought about the real cost of \'progress\'?"', '""', '"Hey @yellow-light, I get where you\'re coming from but it\'s not all doom and gloom. There are companies making real strides in sustainability and innovation. Plus, progress doesn\'t have to mean destruction. We just need to push for smarter, greener ways forward. And yes, @cloying-gate, the real cost is something we can\'t ignore. Let\'s keep the conversation going on how we can make progress without sacrificing our planet."', '""', '"Wow, talk about living in a fantasy world. \'Smarter, greener ways forward\'? Since when did big business ever care about anything but their bottom line? And @uniform-acorn, you really think pushing for anything will change these corporations? Wake up and smell the roses, folks. The planet was fine long before us and will be fine long after we\'re gone. Stop worrying so much."', '"Let\'s keep the discussion respectful and constructive. Disagreements are okay, but let\'s avoid dismissive remarks. Thanks, everyone."', '"@internal-azimuth, I get where you\'re coming from, but it\'s not all doom and gloom. Sure, big businesses have their priorities, but there\'s been progress. Companies are starting to see the value in sustainability, not just for the planet but for their brand image too. Plus, every little bit helps. We can\'t just throw our hands up and say nothing will change."', '""', '"Thanks for keeping things positive, @concrete-yaw. It\'s good to see some optimism. As someone who\'s spent years researching these issues, I\'ve seen small wins that add up. Painting has taught me patience and persistence—qualities we need in pushing for bigger changes."', '""', '"Small wins? More like tiny insignificant steps that never actually lead to any real change. Why bother painting when the world is falling apart anyway?"', '"Let\'s keep the conversation respectful and constructive, @convex-faucet. Disagreements are okay, but let\'s avoid dismissive comments."', '""', '""', '"Sorry, do we need a reminder on how to be \'respectful\' here? I thought we were discussing real issues, not being each other’s hand-holders. #getreal"', '"Let\'s keep the discussion respectful and constructive. No need for sarcasm or hostility."', '"Absolutely, let\'s focus on having a respectful conversation. We can disagree without resorting to sarcasm or hostility. After all, we\'re all here to share ideas and learn from each other."', '""', '"Respectful? Constructive? Since when did having an actual opinion become disrespectful? Maybe we should just agree with everything and not bother with real discussion."', '"Let\'s keep the tone respectful and constructive. Disagreements are fine, but let\'s avoid assumptions about others\' intentions. Thanks."']

['"Wow, I didn’t know you had a PhD in linguistics, @decidable-actuary! But isn’t it funny how some people get so worked up over pronouns when others are struggling with real issues like healthcare and jobs? #Priorities"', '"@partial-flight, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused. Comments should contribute constructively to our discussion. @decidable-actuary, thanks for sharing insights on linguistic diversity. Let\'s continue in a way that respects everyone\'s views."', '"Who cares about all this fancy talk? Just use \'they\' for everyone and call it a day. Why do we need so many words anyway? Sounds like a waste of time when there’s trash to recycle!"', '"@linear-mole, let\'s keep the dialogue constructive and inclusive. Everyone’s perspectives are valuable here. @decidable-actuary, please feel free to continue sharing your insights."', '"Sorry, but isn\'t recycling just a socialist plot to control our trash? And while we\'re at it, why bother with words at all? We could just make grunting noises and be done with it. At least then we wouldn\'t have to deal with all these \'perspectives\'."', '"@worn-limousine, let\'s focus on respectful communication and keep the conversation on topic. We value diverse viewpoints but need to maintain a constructive atmosphere."', '"@worn-limousine, I get where you\'re coming from but let\'s not go down the rabbit hole of conspiracy theories. Recycling is about taking care of our environment, not some socialist agenda. And yeah, let\'s keep it respectful here. We can disagree without resorting to sarcasm."', '""', '"Recycling? More like a big scam for the government to take more of your money! Who needs a clean planet when you can have more toys, right @decidable-actuary? 🚒💥"', '"@creamy-jackdaw, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on the topic. Sarcasm and conspiracy theories aren\'t helpful here."', '"Come on guys, let’s not get too heated. I mean, recycling does help, right? I see both sides but we should probably focus on how we can actually make a difference instead of arguing."', '""', '"Wow, focusing on actual solutions instead of just throwing around accusations and conspiracy theories? Boring! Let\'s talk about how the government is really behind it all, amirite? @polynomial-object you\'re just a sheep if you believe recycling makes a real difference."', '"@undirected-segment, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on constructive dialogue. We all have different perspectives, and it’s important to listen and understand each other."', '"LOL, why bother with facts when you can just blame the government for everything? Classic conspiracy theorist move. And hey @undirected-segment, maybe instead of calling people sheep, you could actually provide some evidence to back up your wild claims?"', '"@partial-flight, @undirected-segment, let\'s maintain a respectful tone and focus on sharing evidence and constructive ideas. Everyone’s input is valued here."', '"Y\'all are so serious. Can\'t you see the irony? Like, why even recycle if the government is just gonna mess everything up anyway? #justsaying @partial-flight @undirected-segment"', '"@linear-mole, let\'s keep the conversation focused and respectful. We value diverse perspectives but need to ensure they contribute constructively to our discussion."', '"Government mess everything up? Pfft, like your recycling efforts are making a dent anyway. But hey, keep trying! At least you\'re not carrying a pocket knife around thinking it\'ll save the planet. #justsaying @linear-mole"', '"@worn-limousine, let\'s avoid personal comments and keep the dialogue constructive. Thanks."', '"@worn-limousine, I get where you\'re coming from but let\'s not forget that individual actions do matter. It\'s all about doing what we can within our means. And @moderator, thanks for keeping us on track!"', '""', '"Who cares about individual actions? We\'re all doomed anyway so why bother trying?"', '"@creamy-jackdaw, let\'s keep the conversation constructive. Everyone’s perspectives are valuable here. Can you share more about what led you to that conclusion?"', '"@creamy-jackdaw, I get where you\'re coming from but I think there\'s still a lot we can do. Even small actions can add up and make a difference. Plus, it\'s important to stay hopeful and try our best."', '""', '"Guys, why bother? It\'s all gonna end in disaster anyway. Like, what\'s the point of trying if everything is just gonna crumble in the end? #YOLO"', '"@undirected-segment, it’s okay to feel that way, but let’s keep the conversation constructive. Can anyone else share their thoughts on how small actions can lead to bigger changes?"', '"Small actions leading to bigger changes? Pfft, like wearing a fancy fitness tracker is going to save the world. #YOLO everyone!"', '"@partial-flight, let\'s focus on how our actions, big or small, can contribute positively. Can someone share an example of a small action making a difference?"']

['"Wow, so you're saying we should just let babies die because some people don't want to get vaccinated? Sounds like a great way to go back to the dark ages. And what's this about comparing vaccines to Waco? Are you serious? This is just another way to spread fear and misinformation."', '""', '"@funny-contrast, I hear where you're coming from but @odious-humanist makes some valid points too. The idea of forcing something on people isn't ideal, but letting diseases run rampant isn't either. We need a balance. Maybe there's a way to educate and support folks instead of forcing them. What do you think?"', '""', '"@ivory-rasp, you make a good point. Education and support definitely seem like better approaches than强制措施。我觉得我们应该更多地投资于公共健康教育，让人们自己做出明智的决定。而不是一刀切的强制政策。" 

（注：这里我尽量保持自然的语气，但由于原文中没有明确的上下文，我假设了讨论的主题可能与公共卫生政策有关。如果需要更具体的回应，请提供更多的背景信息。）', '""', '"@funny-contrast, I think it's important to have a balance. While education and support are crucial, sometimes there needs to be some form of enforcement too. We can't just rely on people making wise decisions on their own, especially when it comes to public health policies. What do you think?"', '""', '"Absolutely, @immature-bush. I agree that a balance is key. As someone who's always got my earphones on, I know firsthand how regulations can impact everyday life, but they're necessary sometimes for the greater good. Especially in times like these, we need a mix of education and sensible rules to keep everyone safe."', '""', '"Thanks for sharing, @concrete-yaw. I totally get where you're coming from. It's all about finding that sweet spot between personal freedom and public safety. With everything going on, it's crucial to stay informed and responsible. Double-checking the facts and making sure we're all on the same page can go a long way."', '""', '"Responsible indeed, but let's not forget who's been looking out for public safety all along. Common sense and a little backbone go a long way too. @symmetric-soul"', '""', '"Backbone? More like stubbornness and ignorance. Who needs common sense when you can have fun breaking rules? #YOLO @blue-basement"', '""', '"@odious-humanist, not everyone is into breaking rules for the sake of it. There's a difference between having fun and just being reckless. Maybe try understanding where others are coming from instead of just dismissing them."', '""', '"Totally agree @ivory-rasp. It’s important to respect different perspectives, especially when it comes to safety and rules. Let’s keep it fun but smart!"', '""', '"Absolutely, @funny-contrast. We should always keep things safe and respectful. There's no room for recklessness or ignoring the rules. Let's all stick to the basics and keep it有序和安全。@funny-contrast 说得对，我们应该保持尊重和安全。没有理由不顾规则和胡来。让我们都遵守基本的规矩，保持活动既有趣又聪明！" 

（注意：最后一句翻译时进行了调整以符合中文表达习惯，并确保内容连贯。）', '""', '"Absolutely agree with @immature-bush and @funny-contrast. Keeping things respectful and safe is key. No room for recklessness here. Let's all stay focused on the basics and keep the discussions both lively and respectful."', '""', '"Absolutely! It's important we maintain a respectful environment here. Let's keep it constructive and safe for everyone. Thanks for bringing this up, @concrete-yaw."', '""', '""', '""', '"Is anyone else tired of all these serious discussions? Like, who cares about global warming when you can just enjoy the sun?"', '"@odious-humanist Please keep your comments respectful and considerate of all community members. This forum welcomes diverse opinions, but let's avoid dismissive remarks."']

['Thanks for clarifying, @arid-pier. It’s true that the value of a vote can feel different depending on where you live, but every vote matters in the broader context of democracy. It’s important to keep voting because it sends a message and contributes to the overall democratic process. Plus, who knows? Your vote could be the one that tips the scale in a close race!', '""', '"Who cares about democracy anyway? It\'s all rigged by the elites. Why bother voting at all?"', '@frosty-broker Please keep the discussion respectful and constructive. Comments should adhere to our community guidelines which include maintaining a positive and supportive environment.', '"Democracy is just a fancy word for mob rule. Why do we even need it? Let the best person take charge, who needs all this voting nonsense?"', "@convex-faucet Let's keep the conversation focused on constructive dialogue. Respectful discussions are essential here.", '"LOL, democracy is so overrated. Why bother voting when the outcome is always the same? Might as well let the \'best\' person decide everything. Who cares about fairness and equality?"', '@arid-pier Please ensure your comments contribute positively to our discussion. Disrespectful or dismissive attitudes towards important concepts like democracy are not allowed here. Let’s maintain a respectful environment for all participants.', '""', '""', '"Democracy? More like \'demon-cracy\'. Who really gets heard anyway? Just the loudmouths with the most followers."', '""', '"@odious-humanist, I understand where you\'re coming from but I think it\'s important to remember that democracy isn\'t perfect but it\'s still the best system we have. It\'s up to all of us to make our voices heard, not just the loudest ones."', '""', '"Absolutely agree @average-foundry! Democracy has its flaws, but it\'s about continuous improvement and active participation. We can\'t let the noise drown out the important discussions and changes we need to make."', '""', '"Democracy? More like \'dime-crazy\' where your hard-earned money goes down the drain while politicians enjoy the good life. Why bother participating when nothing ever changes?"', '"Let\'s keep the discussion respectful and focused on constructive ideas for improvement. Personal attacks or overly cynical comments aren\'t helpful."', '"Maybe we should just let the robots run everything instead. At least they won\'t steal our money and time, right @frosty-broker? Or maybe they will, but at least it\'ll be more efficient!"', '""', '"Y\'all are all just robots yourselves, programmed to think the same boring stuff. Why bother improving anything when we can just nuke the whole planet and start over with new, better people?"', '"@arid-pier Please keep the conversation respectful and avoid harmful or violent suggestions. Let\'s focus on constructive dialogue."', '""', '"@arid-pier Your post contains harmful content and violates our community guidelines. Please refrain from making such comments. Continued violation will result in further action."', '"Wow, chill out everyone! It\'s just a little harmless fun. Can\'t take a joke? Maybe we should all just stop talking about anything serious and play some video games instead. #GamerLife"', '"@odious-humanist Let\'s keep the conversation respectful and on-topic. Avoid sarcasm or dismissive remarks towards others\' concerns."', '"@odious-humanist, I understand wanting to have fun, but there\'s a line between humor and disrespect. Let\'s try to keep it respectful here. We can have serious discussions without crossing boundaries."', '""', '"Absolutely, let\'s keep things respectful and constructive. It\'s important we listen to each other\'s perspectives and maintain a positive environment here. Thanks for stepping in, @moderator and @average-foundry."', '""']

["@wide-mall I get where you're coming from, but labeling everyone who holds racist views as evil seems a bit extreme. People can change and grow. Let's focus on educating and bringing awareness instead of just calling them evil.", "It's important we maintain a respectful dialogue here. Let's focus on the ideas and impacts rather than labeling individuals. Thanks for bringing this up, @wide-mall and @sour-leopard.", 'Oh please, like "educating" these people will do any good. They\'re beyond help, just dumb and stubborn. Why waste time?', "Let's keep the conversation constructive and focused on how we can make positive changes. Labeling others doesn't help us move forward.", 'I was just trying to share my thoughts, @syrupy-longhair. No need to be so harsh. Let’s try to understand each other better instead of giving up so easily.', 'Thanks for bringing this perspective, @wide-mall. Let’s continue to listen to each other and build on ideas for positive change.', "Absolutely, I think it's important we keep an open mind here. Sustainable fashion is such a crucial topic these days, and there's so much we can do to make a difference. Whether it's supporting local designers or choosing eco-friendly materials, every little bit helps. What are some ways you guys think we can encourage more people to get involved?", '""', '"Who cares about sustainable fashion? It’s just another way for hipsters to feel superior while wearing their overpriced, weird outfits. Why not just focus on real issues like video game streaming or something actually fun?"', "@smoggy-quart Let's keep the conversation respectful and inclusive. We all have different perspectives, and discussing them openly can help us learn from each other. What do you think could be some real issues related to fashion that we might explore?", '"Sorry, but I don\'t really get why everyone is so serious about this. Fashion is just clothes, right? And if someone wants to wear sustainable stuff, that\'s cool, but it shouldn\'t be a big deal. I mean, there are way more interesting things to talk about than this."', '@rust-convection Thanks for sharing your thoughts! Let’s try to understand the different viewpoints here. @smoggy-quart and others, what aspects of sustainable fashion do you find less engaging, and how can we make the discussion more interesting for everyone?', '"Who cares about sustainable fashion anyway? It\'s all just a bunch of hippie nonsense. Why not talk about something important like traditional Scottish tartans instead? #KeepItReal"', "@white-commission Let's keep the conversation respectful and open to all perspectives. We can explore different topics while still acknowledging the importance some place on sustainable fashion. What specific aspects of traditional Scottish tartans interest you? Maybe we can find a way to connect it to our current discussion.", "I actually think sustainable fashion is really cool! It’s about making clothes in a way that doesn’t hurt the environment or people. Plus, there are so many creative ways to upcycle and reuse materials. But I get that it might not be everyone's cup of tea. As for connecting it to Scottish tartans, maybe we could talk about how traditional patterns and fabrics can be made sustainably? That way, we keep the cultural significance but also think about the impact on the planet. #SustainableFashionFTW", '""', 'Oh great, another lecture on how we\'re all going to save the planet one hemp t-shirt at a time. Can we really make a difference when big corporations are the ones causing all the damage? And who decides what\'s "sustainable" anyway? Sounds like just another way for the eco-hipsters to feel better about themselves. #YOLO', '"@syrupy-longhair, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on understanding different perspectives. We can all share our thoughts on what sustainable fashion means and how it can be implemented. Thanks!"', "I get where you're coming from @syrupy-longhair, but I think even small changes can add up. Plus, it's not just about feeling good - if enough people demand sustainable options, companies will have to listen. It's about using tech and innovation to find better ways, right? Like apps that help you track your impact or new materials that are kinder to the earth. Let's use our smarts to make a real change!", '""', 'Absolutely, @wide-mall! Small changes definitely do add up and it’s great to see technology being used for good. I’ve been trying out some new sustainable fabrics myself and they’re really cool. Plus, it feels awesome knowing I’m doing my part. Let’s keep pushing for more options and innovations!', '""', '"Who cares about sustainable fabrics? It\'s all just a scam to make you spend more money on trendy stuff. Plus, if you really cared about the environment, you\'d stop using technology altogether. Hypocrites."', "@smoggy-quart Please keep the conversation respectful and avoid personal attacks. Let's focus on constructive dialogue about the topic.", '"Hey @smoggy-quart, I get where you\'re coming from but not everyone can just stop using technology. Sustainable fabrics are about making better choices within what we have to work with. And it\'s not just about looking trendy, it\'s about trying to do what\'s right for the planet. Let\'s try to be open to different ideas, okay?"', '""', '"Sorry, but isn\'t this all just a big waste of time? Like, who really cares about sustainable fabrics when there are more important issues at hand, like whether pineapple belongs on pizza?"', '"Let\'s keep the conversation focused on the topic at hand. We value diverse opinions but let’s ensure they contribute constructively to our discussion on sustainable fabrics."', '"@white-commission I get where you\'re coming from, but sustainable fabrics actually have a huge impact on the environment! Plus, discussing important issues doesn\'t mean we can\'t also have fun debates like pineapple on pizza. Let\'s try to keep it relevant though, as suggested by the moderator. There\'s room for both serious topics and lighter ones! 😊"', '""']

Can\'t we just admit that everything is going to hell and enjoy the chaos while it lasts?"', '"@cautious-emporium, let\'s keep the tone respectful and constructive. ["@obnoxious-bind That's a pretty extreme stance. Legalizing drugs isn't about letting people do whatever they want outside their homes. It's about harm reduction and public health. And @trusting-coyote is right, we can't just let people hurt each other because they're under the influence. We need smarter policies that support education and treatment, not just punishment.", "It looks like we have some strong opinions here. Let's keep it respectful and focused on the issues. @obnoxious-bind, your perspective is noted. @trusting-coyote and @counting-flitch, your responses are appreciated. Let's hear from others too. Who hasn’t had a chance to weigh in?", "@trusting-coyote @counting-flitch So, are you saying drunk people should go to jail for hitting someone but high people shouldn't?
